title: Configure the GAME firewall
description: This is the DDoS protection configuration page for the selected IP address. Multiple firewall rules can be configured to best protect all applications hosted on the selected IP address.
subDescription: Tip: you can choose 'other' protocol to allow arbitrary traffic to one or more specific ports. We suggest applying the 'Default Deny' policy which will block traffic on all other (undefined) ports for better protection.
max_rules_reached_tooltip: You have reached the limit of allowed rules
deny_strategy_tooltip: Block all traffic that does not match any of the following rules.
disable_deny_strategy_modal_description: By doing so, the only games protected will be those matching defined rules. Any other traffic will be able to reach the selected IP without any protection. Do you want to continue?
enable_deny_strategy_modal_description: All game ports that have been defined are protected by the GAME firewall and now, all other traffic will be blocked. Do you want to continue?
default_deny_strategy_enabled_success_me: The GAME's default DDoS protection policy has changed in moments.
default_deny_strategy_disabled_success_m: The GAME's default DDoS protection policy will be disabled in moments.
add_rule_success_message: The firewall rule will be added
delete_rule_success_message: The firewall rule will be removed
confirmDeleteRuleDescription: Do you really want to delete the rule for protocol {{protocol}} ({{port}})?
startPortGreaterThanEndPortError: The starting port is greater than the ending port
portRangeError: Please enter a value between 1 and 65535
conflictingRuleError: The port (or port range) conflicts with another rule
